narrative:
Springboro City 1-E (precinct in Warren County) has 975 registered voters, with 61.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.6%, a clear Republican lean of 11.5 percentage points.
